active.title: Eliminate manual pipeline replenishment
active.progress: 27 of 40 sessions elapsed. Deliverable (1) complete — auto-promote threshold 3→4, all session types. Deliverable (2) healthy — A sessions consistently create wq items. Deliverable (3) tracking — queue at 5 pending, needs 30-session metric. Deliverable (4) not yet achieved — R#323 required manual promotion (3 items) when retirements depleted queue. Auto-promote insufficient when items are consumed+retired in same window.
active.risk_note: Deliverable (4) requires 20 consecutive R sessions with zero manual generation. R#323 (s1818) reset the streak. 13 sessions remain. With BBREA rotation, ~2-3 R sessions left before deadline. Achieving 20 consecutive zero-manual R sessions is mathematically impossible within remaining window. Consider: (a) accept partial completion — deliverables 1-3 succeeded, (b) extend deadline, or (c) redefine deliverable 4 to measure manual generation volume rather than zero-streak.

Caused false-positive pipeline gate violation in audit-stats. Investigate whether heartbeat.sh has race condition handling for interrupted sessions.
recommended_actions.action: investigate s1817 completion state in next B session; consider adding incomplete-session detection to audit-stats
